sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90014" key="prospuria/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσπῠριάω</orth>, <sense id="n90014.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">foment as well</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archig.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg016:100(90)" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.100(90)</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
